name: Iteration 21 — Comparisons pagination shows entries beyond page 1

planSteps.description: Navigate to the Comparisons page at /comparisons
The page loads and shows a table of saved comparisons with columns Old PR, New PR, Old score, New score, Delta
The total count label near the heading shows the real number of comparisons (e.g. '1 total' or any number)
Navigate to the Dashboard history page at /dashboard
Click the Comparisons tab button to switch to the Comparisons tab
The Comparisons tab content is now visible showing a table or an empty state message
The Comparisons tab does NOT show a hard-capped list — either it shows all entries or pagination controls are present if there are more than 10 comparisons
